'''Wakeelmui''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].

==History==
Wakeelmui joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] prior to the [[Indecta Era]]. During the [[Alsakan Conflicts/Legends|Alsakan Conflicts]], it supported [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]].<ref name="TEGtW" />

Wakeelmui was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] world under the authority of [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Yount]]. Since its terrain resembled that of the forest moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], many [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] from Wakeelmui were sent to the garrison on that moon prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]; [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Barich]] was one of them. This system is also tightly connected to the corporation [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]], though it is unknown whether this planet houses the SFS headquarters or merely a major manufacturing center.

One of the major armament upgrades for [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] was manufactured here, the [[L-s7.2 laser cannon/Legends|L-s7.2 laser cannon]], which was used by [[Scythe Squadron/Legends|Scythe Squadron]] TIEs during the Battle of Endor. Sergeant [[Wallen]] was also stationed here, and was later recommended for service on Endor by the governor to [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Igar/Legends|Igar]] of [[Tempest Force/Legends|Tempest Force]].

{{Planet-stub}}
